novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Never plotted against Ma Chao but continued to fight against Wei even after split.
	Had a rift with Ma Teng and killed much of Ma Teng’s family.
	Historically, did not lose his hand to Ma Chao.

full_text:
Han Sui (Wenyue) 韓遂 (文約)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Sui (韓遂), styledWenyue (文約), was born in Jincheng. Worked with Ma Chao in rebelling against Cao Cao. Han Sui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Qiang, Ma Chao, and the Wei Kingdom. Han Sui lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
